Espionage System Types

Type definitions for espionage operations per diplomacy.md:8.2

Core concepts:

  • EBP (Espionage Budget Points): Cost 40 PP each
  • CIP (Counter-Intelligence Points): Cost 40 PP each
  • 7 espionage actions with varying costs and effects
  • Detection system with CIC levels
Constants per diplomacy.md:8.2Helper Procs

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../prestige, ../config/espionage_config

Types

CICLevel {.pure.} = enum
  CIC0, CIC1, CIC2, CIC3, CIC4, CIC5
Counter-intelligence sophistication level 
DetectionAttempt = object
  defender*: HouseId
  cicLevel*: CICLevel
  cipPoints*: int
  action*: EspionageAction
Counter-intelligence detection attempt 
DetectionResult = object
  detected*: bool
  roll*: int
  threshold*: int
  modifier*: int
Result of detection attempt 
EffectType {.pure.} = enum
  SRPReduction, NCVReduction, TaxReduction, StarbaseCrippled
EspionageAction {.pure.} = enum
  TechTheft, SabotageLow, SabotageHigh, Assassination, CyberAttack,
  EconomicManipulation, PsyopsCampaign
EspionageAttempt = object
  attacker*: HouseId
  target*: HouseId
  action*: EspionageAction
  targetSystem*: Option[SystemId]
Attempt to perform espionage action 
EspionageBudget = object
  ebpPoints*: int
  cipPoints*: int
  ebpInvested*: int
  cipInvested*: int
  turnBudget*: int
Espionage budget tracking 
EspionageReport = object
  turn*: int
  attempts*: seq[EspionageResult]
  overInvestmentPenalties*: seq[tuple[houseId: HouseId, penalty: int]]
Espionage phase report 
EspionageResult = object
  success*: bool
  detected*: bool
  action*: EspionageAction
  attacker*: HouseId
  target*: HouseId
  description*: string
  attackerPrestigeEvents*: seq[PrestigeEvent]
  targetPrestigeEvents*: seq[PrestigeEvent]
  srpStolen*: int
  iuDamage*: int
  effect*: Option[OngoingEffect]
Result of espionage attempt 
OngoingEffect = object
  effectType*: EffectType
  targetHouse*: HouseId
  targetSystem*: Option[SystemId]
  turnsRemaining*: int
  magnitude*: float
Effect that lasts for turns

Consts

ASSASSINATION_COST = 10
ASSASSINATION_REDUCTION = 0.5
CIP_COST_PP = 40
CIP_DEDUCTION_PER_ROLL = 1
CYBER_ATTACK_COST = 6
EBP_COST_PP = 40
ECONOMIC_MANIPULATION_COST = 6
ECONOMIC_REDUCTION = 0.5
EFFECT_DURATION = 1
FAILED_ESPIONAGE_PENALTY = -2
INVESTMENT_PENALTY = -1
INVESTMENT_THRESHOLD = 5
PSYOPS_CAMPAIGN_COST = 3
PSYOPS_REDUCTION = 0.25
SABOTAGE_HIGH_COST = 7
SABOTAGE_HIGH_DICE = 20
SABOTAGE_LOW_COST = 2
SABOTAGE_LOW_DICE = 6
TECH_THEFT_COST = 5
TECH_THEFT_SRP = 10

Procs

proc calculateOverInvestmentPenalty(invested: int; turnBudget: int): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate prestige penalty for over-investment Per diplomacy.md:8.2: -1 prestige per 1% over 5% threshold 
proc getActionCost(action: EspionageAction): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get EBP cost for action (from config) 
proc getCIPModifier(cipPoints: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get detection modifier based on CIP points (from config) Per diplomacy.md:8.3 
proc getDetectionThreshold(cicLevel: CICLevel): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get detection roll threshold for CIC level (from config) Per diplomacy.md:8.3 - roll must meet or exceed threshold 
proc initEspionageBudget(): EspionageBudget {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Initialize empty espionage budget

Exports

HouseId, SystemId, PrestigeEvent, globalEspionageConfig
